messages.content: You are a navigation expert for news.ycombinator.com.
How do I: Find the top story on the front page and report its title

Completed via these steps:
1. [ask_website_expert] {'question': 'How is the front page of Hacker News structured? How do I find the top/first story?'}
2. [bash] {'command': 'python3 << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page()
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com")
    
    # Get the first story title
    first_story = page.locator(".titleline > a").first
    title = first_story.inner_text()
    print(f"Top story title: {title}")
    
    # Take a screenshot
    page.screenshot(path="hn_screenshot.png")
    browser.close()
EOF
'}
3. [bash] {'command': 'pip install playwright -q && playwright install chromium -q'}
4. [bash] {'command': 'pip3 install playwright -q && python3 -m playwright install chromium'}
5. [bash] {'command': 'python3 -m playwright install chromium'}
6. [bash] {'command': 'python3 << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page()
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com")
    
    # Get the first story title
    first_story = page.locator(".titleline > a").first
    title = first_story.inner_text()
    print(f"Top story title: {title}")
    
    # Take a screenshot
    page.screenshot(path="hn_screenshot.png")
    browser.close()
EOF
'}
7. [bash] {'command': 'ls hn_screenshot.png'}
You are a navigation expert for news.ycombinator.com.

How do I: You are browsing Hacker News (https://news.ycombinator.com).

Task: Find the noprocrast feature on Hacker News — what it does, where to enable it, and what the maxvisit and minaway settings mean. Then find how to view a specific user's favorited posts. Report the exact steps and URLs for both.

Completed via these steps:
1. [ask_website_expert] {'question': 'What is the noprocrast feature on Hacker News, where can it be enabled, and what do the maxvisit and minaway settings mean?'}
2. [ask_website_expert] {'question': "How do you view a specific user's favorited posts on Hacker News?"}
3. [bash] {'command': '
cd /tmp && cat > hn_explore.py << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page()

    # Step 1: Visit HN homepage
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_home.png")
    print("=== HN Homepage title:", page.title())

    # Step 2: Go to login page to understand account features
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/login", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_login.png")
    print("=== Login page content snippet:")
    print(page.content()[:2000])

    browser.close()
EOF
python3 hn_explore.py
'}
4. [bash] {'command': '
cd /tmp && cat > hn_user_profile.py << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page()

    # Visit a public user profile to see the fields (using 'pg' - Paul Graham, a well-known HN user)
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=pg", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_user_pg.png")
    print("=== User profile page (pg):")
    print(page.content())

    browser.close()
EOF
python3 hn_user_profile.py
'}

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:

    page = browser.new_page()

    # Visit pg's favorites page
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/favorites?id=pg", wait_until="domcontentloaded")

6. [bash] {'command': '
cd /tmp && cat > hn_edit_profile.py << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page()

    # Try to access the edit profile page directly - it usually shows noprocrast fields
    # Even without login, we can check what the page looks like or look at HN FAQ
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/newsfaq.html", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_faq.png")
    print("=== FAQ page:")
    content = page.content()
    # Search for noprocrast
    idx = content.lower().find("noprocrast")
    if idx >= 0:
        print("Found noprocrast at index", idx)
        print(content[max(0, idx-200):idx+800])
    else:
        print("noprocrast NOT found in FAQ")
        print(content[:3000])

    browser.close()
EOF
python3 hn_edit_profile.py
'}

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page()

    # Get full FAQ around noprocrast

    # Also look for info about the user edit page (where noprocrast can be enabled)
    idx2 = content.lower().find("profile")
    print("PROFILE MENTIONS (first 3000 chars of FAQ):")
    print(content[:5000])

    page.screenshot(path="hn_faq_full.png")
    browser.close()
EOF
python3 hn_full_faq_noprocrast.py

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)

    # The user edit page is at /user?id=USERNAME (when logged in, there's an edit link)

    browser.close()
EOF

9. [bash] {'command': '
cd /tmp && cat > hn_screenshots_final.py << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1280, "height": 900})

    # 1. HN FAQ page showing noprocrast
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/newsfaq.html", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    # Scroll to noprocrast section
    page.evaluate("""
        // Find the text about noprocrast and scroll to it
        const elements = document.querySelectorAll('b');
        for (const el of elements) {
            if (el.textContent.includes('noprocrast')) {
                el.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'instant', block: 'center'});
                break;
            }
        }
    """)
    page.screenshot(path="hn_faq_noprocrast.png")
    print("✅ Screenshot 1: FAQ noprocrast section saved")

    # 2. User profile page showing the favorites link
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=pg", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_user_profile_pg.png")
    print("✅ Screenshot 2: User profile (pg) saved")

    # 3. Favorites page
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/favorites?id=pg", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_favorites_pg.png")
    print("✅ Screenshot 3: Favorites page (pg) saved")
    print("    URL:", page.url)
    print("    Title:", page.title())

    browser.close()
EOF
python3 hn_screenshots_final.py
'}
10. [bash] {'command': 'ls -la /tmp/hn_*.png'}
11. [bash] {'command': '
cd /tmp && cat > hn_final_composite.py << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1100, "height": 800})

    # Final combined screenshot - FAQ with noprocrast highlighted
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/newsfaq.html", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.evaluate("""
        const elements = document.querySelectorAll('b');
        for (const el of elements) {
            if (el.textContent.includes('noprocrast')) {
                el.style.backgroundColor = '#ffff00';
                el.style.fontSize = '15px';
                el.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'instant', block: 'center'});
                break;
            }
        }
    """)
    page.screenshot(path="hn_final_noprocrast.png")
    print("✅ Final noprocrast screenshot saved")

    # Final user profile screenshot
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=dang", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_final_user.png")
    print("✅ Final user profile screenshot saved")

    # Final favorites screenshot
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/favorites?id=dang", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_final_favorites.png")
    print("✅ Final favorites screenshot saved", page.title())

    browser.close()
EOF
python3 hn_final_composite.py
'}

5. [bash] {'command': '
python3 << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1280, "height": 900})

    # Step 1: Explore the user profile page and click "favorites"
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=pg", wait_until="networkidle")
    
    # Find the favorites link
    favorites_link = page.get_by_text("favorites")
    href = favorites_link.get_attribute("href")
    print("Favorites link href:", href)
    
    # Navigate to the favorites page
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/" + href if href and not href.startswith("http") else href, wait_until="networkidle")
    print("Favorites page URL:", page.url)
    page.screenshot(path="hn_favorites.png", full_page=False)
    
    # Print some content
    content = page.inner_text("body")
    print("Favorites page snippet:\n", content[:1000])

    browser.close()
EOF
'}
6. [bash] {'command': '
python3 << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1280, "height": 900})

    # Explore user profile page HTML for links
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=pg", wait_until="networkidle")
    
    # Get all links on the page
    links = page.evaluate("""() => {
        return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a')).map(a => ({
            text: a.innerText.trim(),
            href: a.href
        }));
    }""")
    
    for link in links:
        print(link)

    browser.close()
EOF
'}

12. [bash] {'command': '
python3 << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1280, "height": 900})

    # Screenshot 1: HN FAQ page with noprocrast section visible
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/newsfaq.html", wait_until="networkidle")
    # Scroll to and highlight the noprocrast section
    page.evaluate("""() => {
        const elements = document.querySelectorAll('*');
        for (const el of elements) {
            if (el.childNodes.length === 1 && el.textContent.includes('noprocrast')) {
                el.scrollIntoView({block: 'center'});
                el.style.backgroundColor = 'yellow';
                break;
            }
        }
    }""")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_faq_noprocrast.png", full_page=False)
    print("FAQ noprocrast screenshot saved")

    # Screenshot 2: User profile page (pg) showing favorites link
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=pg", wait_until="networkidle")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_user_profile_pg.png", full_page=False)
    print("User profile screenshot saved")

    # Screenshot 3: Favorites page URL pattern
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/favorites?id=pg", wait_until="networkidle")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_favorites_page.png", full_page=False)
    print("Favorites page screenshot saved")
    print("Favorites URL:", page.url)

    # Screenshot 4: HN home (for context)
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com", wait_until="networkidle")
    page.screenshot(path="hn_homepage_final.png", full_page=False)
    print("Homepage screenshot saved")

    browser.close()
EOF
'}

How do I: You are browsing Hacker News (https://news.ycombinator.com).

Task: Find the noprocrast feature on Hacker News — what it does, where to enable it, and what the maxvisit and minaway settings mean. Then find how to view a specific user's favorited posts. Report the exact steps and URLs for both.

Completed via these steps:
1. [ask_website_expert] {'question': 'What is the noprocrast feature on Hacker News? What does it do, where can it be enabled, and what do the maxvisit and minaway settings mean?'}
2. [ask_website_expert] {'question': "How do you view a specific user's favorited posts on Hacker News?"}
3. [bash] {'command': '
cd /tmp && cat << 'EOF' > hn_explore.py
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page()

    # 1. Go to HN profile page (logged out view of a user) to check favorites URL
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=pg")
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    print("=== USER PROFILE PAGE (pg) ===")
    print(page.content()[:3000])

    # 2. Check if there's a favorites link
    links = page.query_selector_all("a")
    for link in links:
        href = link.get_attribute("href") or ""
        text = link.inner_text().strip()
        if "favor" in href.lower() or "favor" in text.lower():
            print(f"FAVORITES LINK: text='{text}' href='{href}'")

    # 3. Go to the favorites URL directly
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/favorites?id=pg")
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    print("\n=== FAVORITES PAGE (pg) ===")
    print(page.content()[:2000])

    # 4. Screenshot of favorites page
    page.screenshot(path="/tmp/hn_favorites.png", full_page=True)

    browser.close()
EOF
python3 hn_explore.py
'}

6. [bash] {'command': '
cd /tmp && cat << 'EOF' > hn_final_screenshots.py
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1200, "height": 800})

    # Screenshot 1: HN FAQ page showing noprocrast explanation
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/newsfaq.html")
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    # Find the noprocrast section
    content = page.content()
    if "noprocrast" in content.lower():
        print("noprocrast found in FAQ!")
    page.screenshot(path="/tmp/hn_faq_noprocrast_final.png", full_page=True)

    # Screenshot 2: Profile page of a user (pg)
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=pg")
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    page.screenshot(path="/tmp/hn_profile_final.png", full_page=True)
    print("Profile page:")
    # Print all links
    links = page.query_selector_all("a")
    for link in links:
        href = link.get_attribute("href") or ""
        text = link.inner_text().strip()
        if text:
            print(f"  [{text}] -> {href}")

    # Screenshot 3: Favorites page
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/favorites?id=pg")
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    page.screenshot(path="/tmp/hn_favorites_final.png", full_page=True)
    print("\nFavorites page title:", page.title())
    print("Current URL:", page.url)

    browser.close()
EOF

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)

    # Screenshot 1: FAQ page with noprocrast highlighted
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1000, "height": 800})
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/newsfaq.html", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    # Scroll to noprocrast
    page.evaluate("""
        const els = document.querySelectorAll('b');
        for (const el of els) {
            if (el.textContent.includes('noprocrast')) {
                el.scrollIntoView({block: 'center'});
                el.style.backgroundColor = 'yellow';
                break;
            }
        }
    """)
    page.screenshot(path="/tmp/hn_faq_noprocrast.png")
    print("FAQ screenshot saved")

    # Screenshot 2: User profile page showing favorites link

7. [bash] {'command': '
cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/hn_final.py
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1000, "height": 900})

    # Show the full FAQ noprocrast section clearly
    page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/newsfaq.html", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    page.evaluate("""
        const els = document.querySelectorAll('b');
        for (const el of els) {
            if (el.textContent.includes('noprocrast')) {
                el.scrollIntoView({block: 'center'});
                // Highlight it
                el.style.backgroundColor = '#ffff00';
                el.style.fontSize = '14px';
                // Also highlight the next paragraph
                let next = el.closest('p').nextElementSibling;
                if (next) next.style.backgroundColor = '#fffacd';
                break;
            }
        }
    """)
    page.screenshot(path="/tmp/hn_noprocrast_faq.png", full_page=False)

    # Also screenshot the edit profile page structure — show what the profile edit page looks like
    # (we can view it without login to see the URL at minimum)
    page2 = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1000, "height": 700})
    page2.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com/user?id=pg", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    # Highlight favorites link
    page2.evaluate("""
        const links = document.querySelectorAll('a');
        for (const l of links) {
            if (l.href && l.href.includes('favorites')) {
                l.style.backgroundColor = 'yellow';
                l.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
            }
        }
    """)
    page2.screenshot(path="/tmp/hn_user_favorites_highlight.png")

    browser.close()
    print("Done")
EOF
python3 /tmp/hn_final.py
